# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata: 
 name: peer-mtls   # Name of the policy, can be whatever you like here      
 namespace: myserviceNamespace    # Replace with your own namespaces    
spec: 
 targetSelector: 
   - labelSelectors:     
         app: myapp            # This should match our microservices' labels or name. For example if they are called 'myservice'. You may need to change this based on the services you have in place         
 rules:    [...]             # More details about each rule can be found below
